title: Names of God
description: Discover God through His names — 7 days exploring who He is

readings.title: Elohim — The Creator
readings.reflection: What does it mean that God is the origin of everything?

original_term.meaning: God (plural of majesty) — the Creator, the supreme deity

readings.title: Yahweh — The Self-Existent One
readings.reflection: How does God's eternal nature affect your trust in Him?

original_term.meaning: The LORD — the self-existent, eternal covenant name of God

readings.title: El Shaddai — God Almighty
readings.reflection: Where do you need God's almighty power in your life today?

original_term.meaning: God Almighty — the all-sufficient, overpowering God

readings.title: Jehovah Jireh — The Lord Will Provide
readings.reflection: When has God provided for you in an unexpected way?

original_term.meaning: The LORD will see / provide — God who sees the need and meets it

readings.title: Jehovah Rapha — The Lord Who Heals
readings.reflection: What areas of your life need God's healing touch?

original_term.meaning: The LORD who heals — God the physician of body and soul

readings.title: Jehovah Shalom — The Lord Is Peace
readings.reflection: How can you experience God's peace in times of anxiety?

original_term.meaning: The LORD is peace — completeness, wholeness, well-being from God

readings.title: Immanuel — God With Us
readings.reflection: How does knowing God is present change your perspective today?

original_term.meaning: God with us — the promise of divine presence among His people

title: Psalms of Comfort
description: 10 days finding peace and strength in the Psalms

readings.title: The Lord Is My Shepherd
readings.reflection: What does it mean for God to be your shepherd today?

original_term.meaning: Shepherd — one who tends, feeds, and protects the flock

readings.title: God Is Our Refuge
readings.reflection: Where do you run when life feels overwhelming?

original_term.meaning: Refuge, shelter — a place of protection and trust

readings.title: Create in Me a Clean Heart
readings.reflection: Is there something you need to confess and release to God?

original_term.meaning: Clean, pure — ceremonially and morally unblemished

readings.title: My Soul Finds Rest in God
readings.reflection: What is stealing your rest, and can you surrender it?

original_term.meaning: Rest, silence, stillness — quiet waiting upon God

readings.title: How Precious Are Your Thoughts
readings.reflection: How does it feel to know God knows everything about you and still loves you?

original_term.meaning: To know — deep, intimate, relational knowledge

readings.title: The Lord Is Near the Brokenhearted
readings.reflection: Have you experienced God's nearness in a difficult season?

original_term.meaning: Near, close — intimate proximity and presence

readings.title: I Will Fear No Evil
readings.reflection: What fear can you bring to God today?

original_term.meaning: Light — illumination, guidance, the opposite of darkness and fear

readings.title: Great Is Thy Faithfulness
readings.reflection: List three ways God has been faithful to you.

original_term.meaning: Lovingkindness, steadfast love — God's covenantal, unfailing loyalty

readings.title: He Heals the Brokenhearted
readings.reflection: What broken piece of your heart needs God's attention?

original_term.meaning: To heal, to mend — restoration of body and spirit

readings.title: Let Everything Praise the Lord
readings.reflection: End this journey with gratitude — what will you praise God for today?

original_term.meaning: To praise, to shine — the root of Hallelujah

title: Parables of Jesus
description: 14 days exploring Jesus' most powerful stories

readings.title: The Sower
readings.reflection: What kind of soil is your heart right now?

original_term.meaning: The sower — one who scatters seed

readings.title: The Mustard Seed
readings.reflection: Where have you seen small faith produce big results?

original_term.meaning: Mustard — the smallest seed that grows into the greatest of herbs

readings.title: The Good Samaritan
readings.reflection: Who is your neighbor that needs help today?

original_term.meaning: Neighbor — anyone near, regardless of ethnic or social boundary

readings.title: The Prodigal Son
readings.reflection: Do you identify more with the younger or older brother?

original_term.meaning: To be moved with compassion — a visceral, gut-level mercy

readings.title: The Lost Sheep
readings.reflection: How does it feel to know God pursues you personally?

original_term.meaning: The lost one — that which has perished or strayed away

readings.title: The Talents
readings.reflection: What has God entrusted to you, and how are you using it?

original_term.meaning: Talent — a weight of great value entrusted for stewardship

readings.title: The Pharisee and Tax Collector
readings.reflection: When are you tempted to compare yourself to others spiritually?

original_term.meaning: Be merciful — to make propitiation, to show atoning grace

readings.title: The Rich Fool
readings.reflection: Are you rich toward God or toward possessions?

original_term.meaning: Fool — senseless, lacking moral and spiritual insight

readings.title: The Pearl of Great Price
readings.reflection: What would you give up for the Kingdom?

original_term.meaning: Pearl — a treasure of surpassing worth

readings.title: The Wise and Foolish Builders
readings.reflection: Is your life built on rock or sand?

original_term.meaning: Rock — a massive, immovable stone foundation

readings.title: The Unforgiving Servant
readings.reflection: Is there someone you need to forgive?

original_term.meaning: To forgive, to release — letting go of a debt or offense

readings.title: The Wedding Feast
readings.reflection: Are you living as if you've been invited to the feast?

original_term.meaning: Wedding feast — the joyful celebration of covenant union

readings.title: The Vine and Branches
readings.reflection: How connected do you feel to the Vine right now?

original_term.meaning: Vine — the source of life and fruitfulness

readings.title: The Sheep and Goats
readings.reflection: How are you serving 'the least of these' in your community?

original_term.meaning: The least — the smallest, most overlooked among us

title: Women of Faith
description: 7 days with remarkable women of the Bible

readings.title: Sarah — Faith in the Impossible
readings.reflection: What promise from God seems impossible in your life?

original_term.meaning: Princess — a mother of nations, named by God Himself

readings.title: Ruth — Loyalty and Redemption
readings.reflection: What does radical loyalty look like in your relationships?

original_term.meaning: Friend, companion — loyalty that crosses every boundary

readings.title: Esther — Courage for Such a Time
readings.reflection: Where has God placed you 'for such a time as this'?

original_term.meaning: Star — hidden beauty and courage revealed at the right moment

readings.title: Mary — Surrendered to God's Plan
readings.reflection: Can you say 'let it be to me according to your word' today?

original_term.meaning: From Hebrew Miriam — exalted one, chosen vessel of grace

readings.title: Hannah — Prayer from the Heart
readings.reflection: What deep desire have you poured out before God?

original_term.meaning: Grace, favor — a heart poured out in prayer before God

readings.title: Deborah — Leading with Wisdom
readings.reflection: How can you lead with courage and wisdom in your sphere?

original_term.meaning: Bee — industrious, purposeful, a leader who brings order

readings.title: Mary Magdalene — First Witness
readings.reflection: What has your encounter with the risen Christ meant to you?

original_term.meaning: Of Magdala — the first witness to the resurrection

title: The Armor of God
description: 7 days studying spiritual warfare from Ephesians 6

readings.title: The Battle Is Real
readings.reflection: Are you aware of the spiritual battle around you?

original_term.meaning: Full armor — the complete set of weapons for a soldier of God

readings.title: Belt of Truth
readings.reflection: Where do you need to stand firm in truth today?

original_term.meaning: Truth — reality as God sees it, the opposite of deception

readings.title: Breastplate of Righteousness
readings.reflection: How does living righteously protect your heart?

original_term.meaning: Righteousness — right standing with God that guards the heart

readings.title: Shoes of the Gospel of Peace
readings.reflection: Are you ready to share the peace of Christ with others?

original_term.meaning: Peace — wholeness and harmony, the gospel's firm footing

readings.title: Shield of Faith
readings.reflection: What fiery darts has your faith extinguished recently?

original_term.meaning: Faith — trust, conviction, reliance on God's promises

readings.title: Helmet of Salvation
readings.reflection: How does the assurance of salvation protect your mind?

original_term.meaning: Salvation — deliverance, preservation, the helmet that guards the mind

readings.title: Sword of the Spirit
readings.reflection: How well do you know God's Word for when you need it most?

original_term.meaning: Sword — a short blade for close combat; the Word of God in action
